*   For the second fraction, divide the numbers: $$ \frac{27}{9} = 3 $$

Question: Find the quotient: $$( 27 b^{3} - 33 b^{2} ) \div 3 b .$$

2. −33 b² ÷ 3 b  
   = (−33 / 3) · (b² / b)  
   = −11 · b  
   = −11 b

Combine the results:

(27 b³ − 33 b²) ÷ 3 b = 9 b² − 11 b
